description:
Without a `files:` override, hex's default globs would ship dev cruft from `priv/helper_scripts/` (bench/spike scripts + a nested fixture mix project under wrd25_200sites/) while OMITTING the golden fixtures the README points users to.

Add an explicit whitelist to the `package:` block (created in the hard-blockers epic, mutagen-y8o.1), e.g.:
  files: ~w(lib mix.exs mix.lock README.md CHANGELOG.md LICENSE)

This excludes priv/helper_scripts, .spec/, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, Makefile, make/. Decide whether any golden fixture or example needs to ship; if the README references golden JSON, either inline an example (see H6) or include the needed files.

Acceptance: `mix hex.build` then inspect the tarball file list — only intended files present.

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED (commit ce0a785)

Added explicit `files:` whitelist to `defp package` in mix.exs:
  files: ~w(lib mix.exs mix.lock README.md CHANGELOG.md LICENSE)

Decisions grounded in repo reality:
- LICENSE confirmed present at repo root (MIT, from mutagen-y8o).
- README is self-contained post-hcs.6: the annotated JSON run example is inlined directly (README lines 519-632). The test/ and priv/ paths in README are clickable GitHub links, not files that must ship. So no test/ golden fixtures or priv/ files need to be in the package.
- Scope limited to mix.exs (package files: key only). Deps untouched (mutagen-hcs.7 owns telemetry removal).

ACCEPTANCE — `mix hex.build` Files list:
    lib/** (full source tree: pipeline, mutators, mutation_runner, test facades, cli, mix/tasks/mutagen.ex, etc.)
    mix.exs
    mix.lock
    README.md
    CHANGELOG.md
    LICENSE

Confirmed ABSENT: priv/helper_scripts/ (and nested wrd25_200sites/), .spec/, test/, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, Makefile, make/.
Build completed cleanly (checksum emitted); generated tarball removed from worktree.

VERIFY: PASS
Session: agent-averify-hcs1-ca7625c76fe28e63 (parent 033814be-550f-48f5-ab4a-ac141d9e94a3)
Log: ~/.claude-remembers/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex/033814be-550f-48f5-ab4a-ac141d9e94a3/subagents/agent-averify-hcs1-ca7625c76fe28e63.jsonl

Mechanical checks:
- Files touched: 1 (mix.exs only? yes). Diff adds the files: key + an explanatory comment to defp package; nothing else changed.

Semantic checks:
- Nothing runtime-needed excluded (priv/ is dev-only, no :code.priv_dir/app_dir reads in lib): yes. grep of lib/ for priv_dir|app_dir|priv/ returns nothing. priv/ contains only helper_scripts/bench_fixtures (dev cruft). All File.read/Path.join in lib/ operate on consumer-supplied --scope/--tests paths at runtime, not packaged assets. test/ references in lib/ are all docstrings/comments (doctest examples, see-test notes), not compile-time file deps. lib/mutagen_ex/test/* are real library modules (facades), not the test/ dir.
- Everything needed included (lib compiles standalone; LICENSE exists): yes. LICENSE present at repo root (MIT, 1071 bytes). Full lib/ source tree ships.
- mix hex.build Files list correct (intended present, cruft absent): yes. Files: full lib/** tree (pipeline, mutators, mutation_runner, test facades, cli, mix/tasks/mutagen.ex, etc.), mix.exs, mix.lock, README.md, CHANGELOG.md, LICENSE. ABSENT confirmed: priv/helper_scripts/ (+ bench_fixtures), .spec/, test/, CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, Makefile, make/.
- hex.build warnings: none. Build exit 0, checksum emitted (3a0dd60...), no missing-required-field warnings.

Verdict: PASS

Notes (advisory only): package still declares telemetry ~> 1.0 dependency; that is correctly out of scope here (mutagen-hcs.7 owns telemetry removal), not a gap for this ticket. Generated mutagen_ex-0.1.0.tar removed; worktree clean.

AUDIT: APPROVE (auto — selective audit)
Session: 033814be-550f-48f5-ab4a-ac141d9e94a3
Log: ~/.claude-remembers/projects/-Users-mz-dev-mz-mutagen-ex/033814be-550f-48f5-ab4a-ac141d9e94a3.jsonl
Reasoning: VERIFY PASS — single-file mix.exs package files: whitelist, 0 scope violations. The one real risk (excluding a runtime asset) is independently cleared: priv/ is dev-only with zero :code.priv_dir/app_dir reads in lib/, and lib compiles standalone. hex.build verified — intended files present (lib, mix.exs, mix.lock, README, CHANGELOG, LICENSE), cruft absent, no warnings. No judgment call remaining.
APPROVED. Merged --ff-only into epic. Gates green: smoke 642/0, format clean, deps.unlock clean. Closing.

title: Add package files: whitelist
